reply_original: Hello! I am deeply sorry for this unpleasant experience. To help us resolve this issue immediately, please email your UID and a screenshot of the error to support@fantachat.ai. Our technical team will investigate why you cannot access characters and get you back to chatting as soon as possible. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！对于这次不愉快的使用体验，我深表歉意。为了帮助我们立即解决此问题，请将您的 UID（可在“设置”中找到）和错误截图发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的技术团队将调查您无法访问角色的原因，并尽快让您恢复聊天。感谢您的耐心等待！
reply_original_before_override: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience! To help us fix this immediately, please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID (found in Settings) and a screenshot of the error. Our technical team will investigate why you can't access characters and get you back to chatting ASAP. Thank you for your patience!
